title: Paler Pale
description: Makes pale wood and related items/entities paler by removing all color
body:
Ever wanted completely white wood in Minecraft and, when they finally added it, it's pinkish? Well here's your solution! With this simple pack, you can make your pale items **even paler!** With this simple pack, you'll get the actually white wood you always wanted!

![comparison](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/7r8jeMa8/images/fa180916af04ece3de6e6d5a8d33dbb1a7f24bb2.png)
